entries.title: Next.js migration & new job feed
highlights: Migrated the main WorkWay experience to the new Next.js app.
Introduced the new **Jobs** feed with better filters and faster navigation.
Improved SEO and structured data for job and company pages.

entries.title: Feedback page & changelog
highlights: Added a dedicated **Feedback** page so you can tell us what to improve.
Launched this public **Changelog** to track visible product changes.
You can edit this page by updating `src/content/changelog.json`.
